skill_name_policy: Every primary_skills entry must resolve to an installed skill directory under ~/.hermes/skills/business-ops/. Renamed per consensus plan Section 2 (Phase 1); do not create alias skill folders.
mvde_policy: Consensus plan Section 11: six roles are active for the MVDE. Roles with mvde_active=false are target-state; their duties run as skills/checklists invoked by the active six until volume justifies promotion.

subagents.role: Opportunity fit, schedule, and bid/no-bid analysis
Extract scope, clauses, dates, attachments, amendments, and source map
Create subcontractor-facing bid packet and internal review bundle
Verify fit, credentials, service area, and contact quality
Draft quote request emails and Gate 2 outreach approval packets
Normalize quotes, scope gaps, exclusions, bid tabs, and basis-of-bid
Labor, insurance, bonds, representations, SAM/FAR compliance extraction
Assemble proposal package and Gate 4 final submission approval packet
Find contradictions, missing attachments, weak assumptions, and polish issues
Keep local files and Google Drive review folders clean, indexed, and reviewable
subagents.note: No installed Drive skill exists yet; Drive logic lives in scripts. scripts/wfg_drive_review_hub.py owns the Phase 3 MVDE review hub workflow.

subagents.role: Create approval packets, send Telegram buttons, reconcile decisions, and trigger workflow pump

rule: Skills are reusable procedures. Subagents are execution contexts with role prompts, goals, boundaries, and assigned skills. Do not replace subagent profiles with skill files.
